label: State-space transitions

node.label: State-space transitions
node.definition: Latent state evolves according to learned transition and observation operators.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, State-space transitions is modeled as depending on Differential equations, Dynamical systems & control theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Selective state-space scan, Structured state-space models (S4 family), Selective state-space models (Mamba family).

atlas downstream link to Structured state-space models (S4 family)
atlas downstream link to Selective state-space models (Mamba family)
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Differential equations, Dynamical systems & control theory.
